ai_summary: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Limited has received final USFDA approval for Oseltamivir Phosphate for Oral Suspension, a generic equivalent to Tamiflu, successfully expanding its generic product portfolio in the US market. While the estimated market size for this specific drug form is a modest US$27 million, this approval reinforces the company's strong regulatory capabilities and adds to its substantial pipeline of 243 ANDA approvals. No material red flags are identified in this announcement.
